headline: Teradyne and onsemi Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the US-Iran ceasefire eased fears of a major disruption to global tech supply chains.

headline: Teradyne Buys TestInsight To Deepen Role In AI Chip Testing
summary: Teradyne (NasdaqGS:TER) has agreed to acquire TestInsight to expand its semiconductor test development capabilities. The deal is focused on improving support for AI and data center chip design and test workflows. The transaction is aimed at helping customers shorten time-to-market for complex semiconductor products. Teradyne, a major supplier of automated test equipment to semiconductor manufacturers, is positioning its portfolio more directly around AI and data center demand. TestInsight...
